name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients, missed renewals cause client dissatisfaction. We provide automated reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or basic calendar reminders.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking multiple insurance policies and renewal dates for clients.
